features: LIMITED EDITION: Air Wick Freshmatic refills in delightful Vanilla & Caramel Iced Latte fragrance, bringing a cosy café atmosphere to your home
LONG-LASTING FRAGRANCE: Each 250ml refill provides up to 70 days of continuous freshness when used with a compatible Freshmatic device
MULTIPACK VALUE: Set of 6 refills ensures a consistent fresh ambiance throughout your home for up to 420 days
AUTOMATIC DISPENSING: Compatible with Air Wick Freshmatic automatic spray devices for hassle-free, continuous fragrance delivery
SEASONAL SCENT: Indulgent combination of sweet vanilla and rich caramel notes creates a warm, inviting atmosphere in any room
description: The 6x Air Wick Vanilla & Caramel Iced Latte Limited Edition Refill is a modern-style air freshener designed for indoor use. With a floral pattern and multicoloured container, this aerosol spray is suitable for all rooms in the house, providing up to 70 days of lasting fragrance. The diffuser and odor eliminator features make it a convenient choice for adults and unisex users, leaving your home smelling delicious with its original vanilla and caramel iced latte scent. This pack of 250ml spray bottles from the trusted brand Air Wick is a practical and stylish addition to your household supplies.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Indoor areas such as kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms, and offices
